query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A frame dominated by saturated red and orange hues with gradients flowing from deep crimson through bright scarlet to yellow-orange at one edge, with soft indistinct cloud-like forms and subtle tonal variations creating a color-field composition without discernible objects or figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded frame saturated with an oppressive sickly red-orange cast, lacking any coherent subject or detail as smeared analog artifacts and murky gradients dissolve into an abstract color-field where surfaces refuse to resolve, evoking damaged film or corrupted footage with its suffocating flat tonality and absence of depth.
